'''Wayson Dower''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] just after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]], and was friends with [[Milo Strander]].

He served in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], where he and Strander were the only soldiers of their 200-man unit to survive. For his bravery, he was promoted to [[First Sergeant/Legends|first sergeant]]. He contemplated leaving [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service, but decided against it.

==Behind the scenes==
Although he believed himself to be the only normal [[Human/Legends|Human]] in his platoon, Dower was almost certainly a [[GeNode]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]], however, evidence exists that contradicts this, as he mentioned cloning to his friend Milo Strander, which is seemingly impossible for GeNode clones.
